title: Durarara!!
sourceNotes: S1 anime (24 eps, 2010) covers light novel vol 1-3. Paired with the Akiyo Satorigi manga adaptation (22 chapters, finished). The Durarara!! x2 sequels (Shou/Ten/Ketsu, 36 cumulative eps) and the Durarara!! SH spinoff are separate AniList entries.

mappings.arc: Dollars / Headless Rider Mystery (S1 First Cour)
